title: onmyoji-bot Eye<->Brain contract
description: Nguon chan ly DUY NHAT cho ranh gioi giua EYE (perception, se port sang Rust) va BODY/MIND (Python). Moi message qua socket localhost deu theo schema nay. Doi schema = sua ca Rust lan Python trong 1 commit.

Button.description: Mot vung kha nang click duoc tren man hinh (do EYE phat hien bang CV).

Resources.description: Tai nguyen doc tu OCR (vang, ve, AP...). null = chua doc duoc.

Observation.description: EYE -> BRAIN. Mot quan sat tai 1 thoi diem. KHONG chua anh raw (chi metadata vai KB).

state_id.description: md5(dhash)[:10] -> ID on dinh, KHOP CHINH XAC (md5 khuech dai 1 bit -> id khac han)

dhash.description: 64-bit dhash dang chuoi '0'/'1'. BRAIN dung de KHOP MO (hamming<=12) khi state_id khong trung. Bat buoc cho world_model.canonicalize.

alive.description: game co dang chay (chong anh stale)

frame_path.description: duong dan anh DEBUG tuy chon (khong dung trong hot loop)

Action.description: BRAIN -> EYE. Mot hanh dong tac dong len game.

ActionResult.description: EYE -> BRAIN. Ket qua sau khi thuc thi action (kem observation moi).

Request.description: BRAIN -> EYE qua socket NDJSON (1 dong JSON / 1 request). EYE tra ve 1 dong JSON tuong ung (Observation cho observe/ping, ActionResult cho act).

with_buttons.description: observe: false = tier 'nav' (bo detect_buttons, ~9x nhanh), chi state_id/loading. Mac dinh true (day du).

id.description: id tuy chon de client ghep request<->response

Response.description: EYE -> BRAIN qua socket NDJSON. Boc ket qua + loi cap giao thuc.

error.description: loi cap giao thuc (parse/op khong hop le)
